sections.title: Introduction and Setup
summaryBullets: Discussed the match lineup and team composition

sections.title: Early Game Analysis
summaryBullets: Reviewed map awareness during laning phase
importantFacts: Team was behind 2k gold at 5 minutes

utterances.text: Okay let's start by looking at your first match from yesterday.
Sure, I think the early game went pretty well but we made some mistakes around dragon.
Let's skip to that moment. What time was the dragon fight?
Around 6 minutes in. I'll pause it here.
So at this point, your jungler is on the opposite side of the map. Why did you engage?
I thought we could win the 4v4 because their support was low. But looking back, I didn't notice their mid had teleport up.
That's a great observation. Always check summoner spells before committing to a fight.
This baron play is where we threw the game. We had a 3k gold lead.
Let's break it down. Notice the vision setup here. You only have one ward in the pit.
